html:
2026-0606
2026-06-12FIN, OSFIFederal Public Sector Labour Relations ActCollective Agreement between the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions of Canada and Public Service Alliance of Canada Order authorizing the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions to enter into a collective agreement with the Public Service Alliance of Canada (PSAC) that covers all employees in the Administrative Support Group bargaining unit for the period beginning on April 1, 2023 and ending on March 31, 2025.N/A
act: Federal Public Sector Labour Relations Act
subject: Collective Agreement between the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions of Canada and Public Service Alliance of Canada
precis: Order authorizing the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions to enter into a collective agreement with the Public Service Alliance of Canada (PSAC) that covers all employees in the Administrative Support Group bargaining unit for the period beginning on April 1, 2023 and ending on March 31, 2025.
